breakdown: This PR refactors the rewards engine (v4 SR pipeline) by moving reward-related functions (_is_state_flag_false, _is_state_flag_true, resolve_level_up_signal, etc.) from game_state.py to a dedicated rewards_engine.py module. It adds new functions: ensure_rewards_box, normalize_rewards_box, is_level_up_active, project_level_up_ui. The architecture shows good separation of concerns, but type safety is weak with minimal explicit annotations and heavy dynamic typing (types.SimpleNamespace, type() constructors). Error handling is present in tests (ImportError/KeyError catching) but not consistently visible across business logic. Naming is descriptive throughout.
key_changes: Moves reward-related functions (_is_state_flag_*, resolve_level_up_signal) from game_state to new rewards_engine module
Adds new functions: ensure_rewards_box, normalize_rewards_box, is_level_up_active, project_level_up_ui
Updates world_logic.py imports to source from rewards_engine instead of game_state
Adds firebase mocking in conftest.py for test isolation
Renames wiki/tips/ files to wiki/sources/ for better organization
